llm_output.security_sensitive_behaviors: When clk_bulk_get_all acquires clock resources for simple->clks, it creates resource leak risk because failure to release clocks would prevent proper system resource management.
llm_output.defensive_behaviors: The clk_bulk_put_all is executed in error paths after clk_bulk_prepare_enable failure to prevent resource leaks by releasing all acquired clock resources.
llm_output.analysis: When clk_bulk_get_all acquires clock resources for simple->clks, it creates resource leak risk because failure to release clocks would prevent proper system resource management.
